programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Our realtors were already superstars, but now it’s time to move them even higher. In this episode, you’ll learn what it takes to win at the highest levels from the 30-billion-dollar-man Jay Abraham, SEO wizard AJ Aluthwala, leadership powerhouse Nate Bailey, and mindset genius Michael Bernoff. They’ll each share game-changing strategies to take our superstars (any anyone watching) into the stratosphere.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s overhaul day on Boom America, and the A-Team gets to work. Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail kick things off with Switch It Up, laying out strategies around “The Volume” while Kyle Reyes pushes for a powerful pivot—refocusing the company squarely on the booming trades community. Next, the team digs into Raida Tech, where Laura highlights how the company is operating 25 years ahead of the curve but desperately needs clearer marketing to match its groundbreaking innovation. American Stories creator Bob Cefail stops by to share the inspiration behind Boom America and the future of independent production in the U.S. From there, the A-Team turns to Tangible Assets, helping refine how Dale can monetize his coin collection business, boost credibility, and reach the right investors. Finally, New Home National Title gets a full diagnostic from the experts as they map out how the company can scale, gain visibility, and earn the recognition it deserves nationwide.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: In this episode the DCD crew heads to the lesser-known but highly productive Red River in Western Louisiana. Despite a slow start to the season, the Red River provides some of the best hunting yet. With mixed bags of woodies, greenheads, and teal. Not to mention a handful of bonus squirrels and wild mushrooms. Shoot straight and come hungry.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Duck hunting in Louisiana is as much about its history as it is about its future. Shoot straight and come hungry because it's the last hunt of the season.

programme.title: Coral Reefs: Trouble In Paradise
programme.desc: An international scientific team travels to the Chagos Archipelago, a tropical paradise in the Indian Ocean, to study one of the planet’s healthiest coral reefs. Initially, they’re thrilled with the reef’s beauty and abundance. But in the space of just a few weeks they witness a serious case of bleaching…evidence that even the earth’s most isolated places aren’t safe from the ravages of climate change

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Kayak Fishing vs Executive Chef

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Our realtors were already superstars, but now it’s time to move them even higher. In this episode, you’ll learn what it takes to win at the highest levels from the 30-billion-dollar-man Jay Abraham, SEO wizard AJ Aluthwala, leadership powerhouse Nate Bailey, and mindset genius Michael Bernoff. They’ll each share game-changing strategies to take our superstars (any anyone watching) into the stratosphere.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s overhaul day on Boom America, and the A-Team gets to work. Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail kick things off with Switch It Up, laying out strategies around “The Volume” while Kyle Reyes pushes for a powerful pivot—refocusing the company squarely on the booming trades community. Next, the team digs into Raida Tech, where Laura highlights how the company is operating 25 years ahead of the curve but desperately needs clearer marketing to match its groundbreaking innovation. American Stories creator Bob Cefail stops by to share the inspiration behind Boom America and the future of independent production in the U.S. From there, the A-Team turns to Tangible Assets, helping refine how Dale can monetize his coin collection business, boost credibility, and reach the right investors. Finally, New Home National Title gets a full diagnostic from the experts as they map out how the company can scale, gain visibility, and earn the recognition it deserves nationwide.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

programme.title: Crowned
programme.desc: CROWNED is an unscripted docu-series following seven Texas Southern University students competing for the titles of Mister and Miss TSU during the university's landmark 99th year on the Road to 100. From January applications to April's crowning night, cameras capture everything: the grueling daily practices, the personal sacrifices, the Campaigning Day marathon, and the raw emotion of seven young people transforming from ambitious students into polished leaders.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Locked On HBCU
programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Rickwood: The Soul of Birmingham
programme.desc: This is the story of the oldest professional ballpark in the U.S. and the determination of its home team, the Black Barons. The voice of Rickwood tells the tale of its pivotal role in The Negro League, Black history and its legacy in American sports.
